data.title: CrossAmerica Partners will reveal 2025 Q4 and full year earnings on Feb 25.
data.description: A recent report indicates that the global economy is expected to grow by 4.3% in 2022, which is a noticeable improvement from the 3.6% growth experienced in 2021. This positive outlook is mainly attributed to the ongoing recovery from the COVID-19 pandemic and the implementation of various stimulus measures by governments. Additionally, global trade is projected to increase by 5.7% this year, following a 5.1% growth in 2021. However, rising inflation rates and supply chain disruptions continue to pose challenges to this economic recovery. The report also highlights that emerging market and developing economies are forecasted to grow by 5.2% in 2022, slightly higher than the 4.9% growth seen in 2021. This growth is vital for these economies to recover from the impacts of the pandemic and improve living standards for their populations.

data.title: Pinterest (NYSE: PINS) to reveal Q4 and FY 2025 results on Feb 12, 2026 after market close. Conference call at 1:30 p.m. PT. Visit investor.pinterest.com for live webcast.
data.description: Pinterest, Inc. (NYSE: PINS) is set to announce its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year 2025 on February 12th, 2026, after the closing of the market. The company is scheduled to hold a conference call at 1:30 p.m. PT (4:30 p.m. ET) on the same day to discuss these results. Interested parties can access a live webcast of the conference call and accompanying earnings materials on Pinterest’s Investor Relations website at investor.pinterest.com. A replay of the webcast will also be available for later viewing.

data.title: European Commission approves Aspaveli® for C3G and primary IC-MPGN treatment. 8,000 in Europe have these conditions. First treatment available for patients 12 years and older.
data.description: In Europe, around 8,000 individuals are currently affected by C3G or primary IC-MPGN. Aspaveli (pegcetacoplan) has emerged as a groundbreaking solution for primary IC-MPGN, serving as the inaugural treatment option for both C3G and primary IC-MPGN in patients aged 12 years and above. This development was announced in Stockholm on January 16, 2026, by Sobi® (STO: SOBI).

data.title: Sila Realty Trust buys Oklahoma City rehab facility for $43.1 million in Tampa acquisition.
data.description: Sila Realty Trust has successfully finalized the acquisition of an Inpatient Rehabilitation Facility in Oklahoma City for a total sum of $43.1 million. The transaction, which took place in Tampa, Florida, marks a significant investment by Sila Realty Trust in the healthcare sector.

data.title: PNC reports $7.0B net income for 2025, $2.0B for Q4, with $16.59 and $4.88 diluted EPS respectively. Record revenue, share repurchases planned.
data.description: In the last quarter of 2025, our company achieved record revenue, leading to a net income of $2.0 billion and a growth in Diluted EPS to $4.88. We saw positive operating leverage of 5%, resulting from increases in Net Interest Income (NII), Net Interest Margin (NIM), and noninterest income. We also experienced growth in loans and deposits. Additionally, on January 5, 2026, we successfully closed the acquisition of FirstBank. These strong financial results have encouraged us to plan share repurchases in the near future.

data.title: Glassnode now offers 40 options metrics, including data from Deribit, OKX, and Bybit. New tools for BTC, ETH, SOL trading have been added.
data.description: Glassnode has increased its range of metrics options from 10 to 40, incorporating data from Deribit, OKX, and Bybit. They have also introduced new tools for analyzing gamma exposure and premium flow in Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH), and Solana (SOL) trading. This expansion provides a more comprehensive analysis for traders and investors interested in these cryptocurrencies.

data.title: NorthWest Copper Corp. reports final drill results from 2025 exploration at Kwanika project, highlighting Andesite Breccia expansion potential. Encouraging results to be followed up in 2026.
data.description: On Jan. 16, 2026, NorthWest Copper Corp. (TSX-V: NWST) released the final drill findings from its 2025 exploration at the Kwanika project in British Columbia. Among the eighteen holes drilled, the last three targeted regions beyond the main Kwanika Central deposit. One hole effectively progressed the Andesite Breccia target, indicating possible expansion opportunities to the northwest and deeper levels. The results were positive, prompting further investigation in the upcoming 2026 drill campaign.

data.title: BingX partners with Scuderia Ferrari HP, their first motorsport collaboration.
data.description: In Panama City on January 16, 2026, BingX, a top crypto exchange and Web3-AI firm, revealed a significant partnership with Scuderia Ferrari HP. This marks BingX's debut venture into motorsports collaboration and Scuderia Ferrari HP's first-ever partnership with a crypto exchange. The agreement spans multiple years, showcasing the commitment of both entities to mutual growth and development in the industry. This partnership stands as a significant move for BingX in expanding its reach, while offering Scuderia Ferrari HP a unique opportunity to venture into the world of crypto, both aiming to capitalize on the diverse opportunities presented by this collaboration.

data.title: FlyQuest and Logitech G expand partnership to include all competitive teams after success with FlyQuest RED.
data.description: On January 16, 2026, FlyQuest revealed an extended partnership with Logitech G, encompassing support for FlyQuest's entire competitive ecosystem. This expanded collaboration comes after a fruitful relationship with FlyQuest RED and will now cover all aspects of FlyQuest's operations.

data.title: Belarus permits 'cryptobanks' under new decree, enabling token activity in banking with central bank supervision.
data.description: Under the recently implemented regulations, banks are now permitted to merge token operations with payment and financial services. This initiative will be overseen by both central banks and technology parks.
